PROP-01b-partial3-inv-043.text: Prices stored in transmit() must be scaled to 18 decimals before storage.
PROP-01b-partial3-inv-043.assertion: forall transmit(report): s_dataStreamsPrice[asset].usdPrice has 18 decimal precision

locations.note: lines 166-172: scales usdPrice to PRICE_DECIMALS (18) before storing in s_dataStreamsPrice
